sources.integration_evidence: FleetDM live osquery, Unified Agent 30 monitors, Seraph Deception Engine, Velociraptor VQL, Falco, Suricata, SOAR

certification_tiers.S5-C-Docker-D: Certified Platinum — Docker sandbox, direct sigma match
certification_tiers.S5-C-Docker-H: Certified Platinum — Docker sandbox, heuristic sigma
certification_tiers.S5-C-GHA-H: Certified Platinum — GHA runner, heuristic sigma
certification_tiers.S5-C-GHA-D: Certified Platinum — GHA runner, direct sigma
certification_tiers.S5-C-Docker-D-I: Certified Platinum — inherited from S5-C parent, Docker, direct sigma
certification_tiers.S5-C-Docker-H-I: Certified Platinum — inherited from S5-C parent, Docker, heuristic
certification_tiers.S5-C-GHA-D-I: Certified Platinum — inherited from S5-C parent, GHA, direct
certification_tiers.S5-C-GHA-H-I: Certified Platinum — inherited from S5-C parent, GHA, heuristic
certification_tiers.S5-P: Platinum — full evidence stack, VNS or single execution environment
certification_tiers.S4-VNS: Gold — Virtual Network Sensor simulation confirmed
certification_tiers.S2: Bronze — limited or no execution evidence
